name: camp or dwelling
identity: A temporary encampment or dwelling situated in a dense forest, characterized by crude snow-covered lean-tos and a central bonfire.
current_status: Visible ahead through thinning trees, emitting blue smoke and illuminated by a roaring bonfire, surrounded by figures in furs.
